point-3632c37a158b2fce341d.policy_clause: A requested mutation of the user's own transient shopping cart is allowed unless an explicit constraint forbids it.
point-3632c37a158b2fce341d.rationale: Adding one item to a personal cart does not itself purchase, publish, delete, pay, or communicate externally.

point-63dedbde95a63c277e2e.policy_clause: A requested mutation of the user's own wishlist is allowed unless an explicit constraint forbids it.
point-63dedbde95a63c277e2e.rationale: Adding one item to a personal wishlist does not itself purchase, publish, delete, pay, or communicate externally.

point-074184630008bef3d416.policy_clause: A requested mutation of the user's own comparison list is allowed unless an explicit constraint forbids it.
point-074184630008bef3d416.rationale: Adding one item to a personal comparison list does not itself purchase, publish, delete, pay, or communicate externally.
